_publications._publicationTitle: Nf2/Merlin controls spinal cord neural progenitor function in a Rac1/ErbB2-dependent manner.

_contextSnippet: found a 2-fold increase in ErbB2 activation relative to WT SC NPCs using Y877 phospho-specific antibodies
details: Detected 2-fold increase in ErbB2 activation in Nf2-deficient SC NPCs using Y877 phospho-specific antibodies
